description: The Lyons Crime Family is an organised crime group based in Glasgow, Scotland, involved in drug trafficking, money laundering, extortion, and violence. Founded in the 1990s by Eddie Lyons Snr, the group has been engaged in a deadly feud with the Daniel Crime Family since 2001. The family operates in the UK, Spain, and the UAE, and has ties to the Kinahan Organized Crime Group.

country_links.evidence_quote: On 28 March 2026, Steven Lyons was arrested at I Gusti Ngurah Rai International Airport in Bali after arriving on a flight from Singapore .
country_links.context: A leader of the Lyons Crime Family was arrested in Bali, indicating the organization's presence there.

country_links.evidence_quote: Europol said the operation also involved support from authorities in the Netherlands , Turkey and the United Arab Emirates
country_links.context: The Netherlands supported an operation targeting the Lyons Crime Family's drug trafficking network.

country_links.evidence_quote: On 28 March 2026, Steven Lyons was arrested at I Gusti Ngurah Rai International Airport in Bali after arriving on a flight from Singapore .
country_links.context: The Lyons Crime Family routed through Singapore as a transit point for a leader's travel.

country_links.evidence_quote: He subsequently moved to Spain's Costa del Sol . On 31 May 2025, Eddie Lyons Jr and Ross Monaghan were shot dead by a masked gunman after watching the 2025 UEFA Champions League Final at Monaghans Bar in Fuengirola on the Costa del Sol.
country_links.context: The Lyons Crime Family has members based in Spain and carried out activities there, including a shooting in Fuengirola.

country_links.evidence_quote: Europol said the operation also involved support from authorities in the Netherlands , Turkey and the United Arab Emirates , and that assets in Turkey were seized during the investigation.
country_links.context: Turkey supported an operation targeting the Lyons Crime Family and assets were seized there.

country_links.evidence_quote: Steven Lyons is also believed to have connections with the Dubai-based Kinahan Organized Crime Group . On 17 September 2025, four prominent figures linked to the Lyons Crime Family were arrested in Dubai.
country_links.context: The Lyons Crime Family has members based in Dubai and was arrested there; the organization also has connections with a Dubai-based group.
